who: procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor contracts/month, missed compliance alerts cause supplier penalties. We provide compliance monitoring instead of manual tracking of vendor compliance through spreadsheets.
problem: Ensuring vendor compliance with service level agreements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tracking
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Community forums where procurement managers share tools

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
